1860250.name: MiniWarfare
1860250.description:
About the Game

Welcome to MiniWarfare – A Multiplayer Playground of Chaos and Creativity!

Jump into fast-paced, action-packed battles across a variety of unique game modes. Whether you’re strategizing in intense tactical rounds, sneaking through the shadows, or just goofing off with friends while doing quests, MiniWarfare is all about having fun your way.

Game Modes:

🔥 Available Now:

🛡️ Last Team Standing – A high-stakes, tactical showdown where teams fight in round-based elimination matches. One life per round, smart buys, and strategic play decide the winner.

🕵️ Infiltration – A stealth-action mode inspired by classic spy-vs-mercenary multiplayer. Outsmart your opponents with deception, gadgets, and teamwork.

🧟 Extraction – Survive against the undead while scavenging for loot in a high-risk Co-op mode. Work with teammates to fight off zombies, secure valuable gear, and escape before this dangerous world takes you down.

🚀 Coming Soon:

🏗 (Tactical Build Mode) – Construct defenses, fortify objectives, and outmaneuver the enemy in this strategy-infused mode where creativity meets combat.

🔒Impostor – Trust no one. In this tense, psychological mode, a team of players must complete objectives while secretly trying to identify and eliminate the hidden traitor among them. Be careful, the impostor will do anything to sabotage the mission and sow discord within the group.

🔄 More creative and chaotic modes are in development! Expect new challenges, surprises, and ways to play in future updates.

Features:

🎨 Stylized & Vibrant Art Style – A fresh, eye-catching world filled with colorful characters and creative environments.

🔫 Expanding Game Modes – Jump into available modes like Last Team Standing and Infiltration, with more exciting modes, including Tactical Build Mode and Zombie Extraction, coming in future updates!

🏆 Progression & Rewards (Coming Soon!) – Level up, earn skins, and unlock emotes as you progress through the game. Future updates will bring even more ways to personalize your experience!

👥 Varied Player Counts – Enjoy small tactical matches or large-scale chaotic battles, depending on the mode.

🎉 Casual & Competitive Fun – Whether you're sweating for the win or just messing around with friends, MiniWarfare delivers an experience for every type of player.

🚀 Early Access & Growing! – MiniWarfare is constantly evolving, with new content, features, and improvements on the way. Join the game now and help shape its future!

Gather your squad, explore unique game modes, and experience multiplayer action without limits!

英语*
